title: Axus Decor Paint Scuttle (Blue Series) Paint Bucket With Metal Handle - Compatible For All Types of Paints & Epoxies - Ideal For Professional Painter's & DIY Enthusiasts - 2L
features: VERSATILE DESIGN: The paint roller bucket has a capacity of 2 liters and can be used with various paint types, such as oils, varnishes, water-based paints, and epoxies. It makes an ideal choice for DIY enthusiasts and professional Painter's.

ROLL-OFF GRIDS: The scuttle has roll-off grids on the tapered wall to help users quickly remove excess paint and prevent unwanted spills. This feature ensures a mess-free painting experience and allows for more efficient and precise painting.

ERGONOMIC HANDLE: Our paint scuttle has a sturdy metal handle, making it easy to transport even when fully loaded with paint. The ladder hook-compatible notch adds convenience for hanging on tools or ladders.

MEASURE MARKER: The Paint Scuttle has a measure marker that displays both imperial and metric units for precise measurements, making it easy to measure the perfect amount of paint and reducing time and wastage.
STABILITY: The paint scuttle's robust construction ensures stability even when filled, and it resists twisting and deformation during transport, ensuring its longevity.
description: Axus Decor Paint Scuttle is a container designed to hold and distribute paint for various projects. It is typically rectangular with a flat bottom and tapered sides and is made of durable plastic. The scuttle usually comes with a metal wire handle that can be used to carry or hang it. The scuttle has a large opening at the top that allows for easy pouring of paint, and it also has a built-in grid or roller ramp that helps to remove excess paint from rollers or brushes. The scuttle can hold many colors, making it ideal for use on more significant painting projects such as walls, ceilings, or exterior surfaces. The Axus Decor Paint Scuttle is known for its quality and durability and is often used by professional Painter's and DIY enthusiasts. Its design helps to minimize spills and drips, making it a convenient and efficient tool for any painting project.
